input.instructions: Construct a Trie from the given N bitstrings. For each node in the Trie, track whether it is the end of an original ID and how many original IDs pass through or end at this node. Identify the structure of the tree where nodes are prefixes.

variables.selected_prompt_text:

Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.

JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.

}

Question:
Construct a Trie from the given N bitstrings. For each node in the Trie, track whether it is the end of an original ID and how many original IDs pass through or end at this node. Identify the structure of the tree where nodes are prefixes.

results.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: A prefix tree where nodes represent bit prefixes.
JUSTIFICATION: Trie nodes store end-of-ID flags and prefix counts.
